audit_items.proof_trace: The file stores raw pointers (px_, ptr, p_) but never applies * or -> to them within its own code. The only operations are: passing them to checked_delete (which calls 'delete px_', null-safe per C++ standard), passing them to custom deleters (del(ptr)/d_(p_), where any dereference is inside the deleter—outside this file), and using a null pointer as a locality hint to std::allocator::allocate (not dereferenced). All three template classes and their methods are free of null pointer dereferences.
